title: Samtale med fastlegen som tiltak for å øke vaksinasjonsdekningen, studieprotokoll [Conversation with GP to increase vaccine coverage, study protocol]
author: Tuv, Marit
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Study protocol for a randomised trial in Norway: General practitioner phone calls to increase COVID-19 vaccine uptake among high-risk patients. Protocol was finalised 07.12.2021 and registered in clinicaltrials.gov 08.12.2021.
steps_raw: Study protocol for a randomised trial in Norway: General practitioner phone calls to increase COVID-19 vaccine uptake among high-risk patients. Protocol was finalised 07.12.2021 and registered in clinicaltrials.gov 08.12.2021.
